verses.text: Aaron and the Levites bear the iniquity of the sanctuary. The charge. Priests answer for the holy.
Aaron and the Levites bear the iniquity of the sanctuary. The charge. Priests answer for the holy.
Aaron and the Levites bear the iniquity of the sanctuary. The charge. Priests answer for the holy.
Aaron and the Levites bear the iniquity of the sanctuary. The charge. Priests answer for the holy.
The priesthood is a service of gift; the stranger that comes near dies. Gift. The office is God's to give.
The priesthood is a service of gift; the stranger that comes near dies. Gift. The office is God's to give.
The priesthood is a service of gift; the stranger that comes near dies. Gift. The office is God's to give.
The priests have the most holy offerings as their portion. Portion. They live by the altar.
The priests have the most holy offerings as their portion. Portion. They live by the altar.
The priests have the most holy offerings as their portion. Portion. They live by the altar.
The wave offerings and firstfruits are theirs. Gifts. God provides for His ministers.
The wave offerings and firstfruits are theirs. Gifts. God provides for His ministers.
The wave offerings and firstfruits are theirs. Gifts. God provides for His ministers.
Every devoted thing is theirs; the firstborn is redeemed. Devoted. The holy belongs to the priests.
Every devoted thing is theirs; the firstborn is redeemed. Devoted. The holy belongs to the priests.
Every devoted thing is theirs; the firstborn is redeemed. Devoted. The holy belongs to the priests.
The firstlings of clean beasts are offered; theirs is a covenant of salt. Covenant. God's provision is sure.
The firstlings of clean beasts are offered; theirs is a covenant of salt. Covenant. God's provision is sure.
The firstlings of clean beasts are offered; theirs is a covenant of salt. Covenant. God's provision is sure.
The Levites have no inheritance, for 'I am thy part'; the tithes are theirs. God their portion. The LORD Himself is their inheritance.
The Levites have no inheritance, for 'I am thy part'; the tithes are theirs. God their portion. The LORD Himself is their inheritance.
The Levites have no inheritance, for 'I am thy part'; the tithes are theirs. God their portion. The LORD Himself is their inheritance.
The Levites have no inheritance, for 'I am thy part'; the tithes are theirs. God their portion. The LORD Himself is their inheritance.
The Levites have no inheritance, for 'I am thy part'; the tithes are theirs. God their portion. The LORD Himself is their inheritance.
The Levites give a tithe of the tithe to the priests. A tithe of tithe. Even ministers give to God.
The Levites give a tithe of the tithe to the priests. A tithe of tithe. Even ministers give to God.
The Levites give a tithe of the tithe to the priests. A tithe of tithe. Even ministers give to God.
The Levites give a tithe of the tithe to the priests. A tithe of tithe. Even ministers give to God.
They offer the best of it and bear no sin by it. The best. God claims the choicest.
They offer the best of it and bear no sin by it. The best. God claims the choicest.
